commands.review_summary:
The branch derives published file size, content type, and SHA-256 from stored blobs before validation and adds mocked regressions for mismatched caller metadata and oversized stored files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main trusts caller size, content type, and SHA-256 metadata, and the branch’s mocked tests demonstrate mismatches with stored bytes. The remaining empty-MIME fallback is also directly source-reproducible, although no real Convex reproduction was supplied.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The PR is maintainer-authored and changes a security boundary; the contributor should fix the MIME fallback and supply real Convex proof before publish-path owner review.

target.title: fix: derive skill publish metadata from storage
target.body:
## Summary

- Derive skill publish file size, content type, and sha256 from stored blobs inside `publishVersionForUser`.
- Keep existing publish inputs working while enforcing file and total size limits against the stored bytes.
- Add regression coverage for caller-supplied metadata that does not match storage.

## Tests

```text
bun run test -- convex/lib/skillPublish.test.ts --reporter=dot
bun run test -- convex/httpApiV1.handlers.test.ts --testNamePattern "publish json|publish multipart|Package publish|multipart package publish|multipart ClawPack|staged ClawPack" --reporter=dot
bun run test -- convex/httpApi.handlers.test.ts --testNamePattern "cliPublishHttp" --reporter=dot
bun run format:check
bun run lint
bunx tsc --noEmit --pretty false
bunx tsc -p packages/schema/tsconfig.json --noEmit --pretty false
bunx tsc -p packages/clawhub/tsconfig.json --noEmit --pretty false
```
target.author: jesse-merhi
